Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE across all rework loops
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time between any rejection activity (e.g., Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION, Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER, Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR) and the subsequent Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: the minimum of the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' or `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' or `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE to occur after the first rejection in a case
Metric: the average of the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' or `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' or `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' or `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET_OWNER' or `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE to the next Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time spent in Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE compared to time spent in Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE and the end of the case

Name: Average cycle time of cases that include Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE versus cases that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time between consecutive occurrences of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in multi-rejection loops
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE specifically in variants involving pre-approval rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average duration of the entire rework segment starting with Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and ending with Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE and the final Payment Handled in cases that eventually complete successfully
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time required for an employee to resubmit after Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE following a rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time from the initial Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in variants containing Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total elapsed time between Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE across all relevant variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE when preceded by Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION versus when preceded by Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE and the next approval activity (e.g., Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION or Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER) in successful paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'
